description: Maps base-image references (FROM <image>:<tag>) to slim CycloneDX SBOMs in this directory. Each entry records the manifest-list digest at the time the SBOM was captured. CI runs container/compliance/base_sboms/check_drift.py on every PR/post-merge; if the live registry digest for any image:tag differs from the recorded digest, CI fails and a refresh PR is required before merge.
format: CycloneDX 1.6 JSON, slim filter (drop properties/hashes/dependencies; keep evidence). Hard cap 4 MB per file in CI.

entry_schema.digest: manifest-list digest at capture time, e.g. sha256:abc...
entry_schema.sbom: filename of the slim CycloneDX SBOM in this directory
